title: Dim Botany Pots
description: Botany Pots meets DimStorage. Transfer your Botany Pots harvest directly into your DimStorage Network.
body:
# Dim Botany Pots

Dim Botany Pots is a simple yet powerful integration mod that combines the convenience of Botany Pots with the storage capabilities of DimStorage.

Stop lagging your server with thousands of hoppers. With the Dimensional Botany Pot, your crops are harvested automatically and sent directly to the DimStorage network.

![Dimensional Botany Pot next to Dimensional Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb5edcebc9b6ffe19f07d82a7a44fb9fdb31eff1_0.webp)

## Features

- Automatic harvesting: Crops harvest themselves and deposit drops directly into a linked DimStorage network
- Craft an Dimensional Botany Pot by combining a Hopper Botany Pot with an Dimensional Chest, Dimensional Tank or Dimensional Tank. Its frequency is kept
- Right click an existing Dimensional Botany Pot with an Dimensional Chest, Dimensional Tank, Dimensional Pouch or another Dimensional Botany Pot, to copy its frequency
- Place an Dimensional Botany Pot with an Dimensional Chest, Dimensional Tank, Dimensional Pouch or Dimensional Botany Pot in your off-hand to apply a new frequency on placement
- If your Dimensional Botany Pot is set to private, only you can modify its frequency
- Full support for [The One Probe](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-one-probe) to display frequency and owner information at a glance

## Dependencies

Requires [Botany Pots](https://modrinth.com/mod/botany-pots) and [DimStorage](https://modrinth.com/mod/dimstorage) to work

[Need a server? Just click on the Picture, use the code Wxrlds for 25% off of your first month and play with your friends!](https://bisecthosting.com/Wxrlds?r=DimStorage+Modrinth)
